channel.title: dead-code-hunter Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the dead-code-hunter codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.title: src/__tests__/ — dead-code-hunter Directory Structure
item.description: Directory listing for src/__tests__/ in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 files and 0 subdirectories.

item.title: src/ — dead-code-hunter Directory Structure
item.description: Directory listing for src/ in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 files and 0 subdirectories.

item.title: AnalysisProcessor Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Handles the refinement, filtering, and reporting of dead code candidates. Architectural overview of the AnalysisProcessor domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 2 source files.

item.title: DeadCodeHunter Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: The core application entry point and orchestration layer for the GitHub Action. Architectural overview of the DeadCodeHunter domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 3 source files.

item.title: MarkdownUtility Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Low-level text processing for GitHub flavored markdown generation. Architectural overview of the MarkdownUtility domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: SupermodelSDK Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: External integration layer for the Supermodel static analysis service. Architectural overview of the SupermodelSDK domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: ActionRunner — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Handles the initialization and finalization of the GitHub environment Architecture documentation for the ActionRunner subdomain (part of DeadCodeHunter domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: DiffFilter — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Intersects analysis results with Git changed file sets Architecture documentation for the DiffFilter subdomain (part of AnalysisProcessor domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: InputParser — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Extracts parameters like API keys and ignore patterns from action configuration Architecture documentation for the InputParser subdomain (part of DeadCodeHunter domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: PatternMatcher — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Manages file path exclusion logic using ignore patterns Architecture documentation for the PatternMatcher subdomain (part of AnalysisProcessor domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: PrReporter — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Constructs the visual representation of findings for PR reviewers Architecture documentation for the PrReporter subdomain (part of AnalysisProcessor domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
